name: Scan CHOP
description: '''DEPRECATED:''' use the [[Laser CHOP]] instead. The Scan CHOP converts a [[SOP]] or [[TOP]] to oscilloscope or laser friendly control waves. The output is usually in the audible range and can be heard directly via an [[Audio Device Out CHOP]], or used to drive the X and Y deflector inputs of an oscilloscope, or a laser projector recreating the imagery. The output can also be visualized through use of a [[Limit SOP]]. A sample component found at: [http://www.derivative.ca/Forum/viewtopic.php?f=22&t=1201 Op to Audio CHOP example] A sample video can be found at: [http://vimeo.com/channels/touchdesigner#3750626 Total Internal Reflection] See also: [[EtherDream CHOP]], [[EtherDream DAT]]

parameters.name: Source OP
parameters.label: Source OP
parameters.description: Choose the source node family.

parameters.name: Sample Rate
parameters.label: Sample Rate
parameters.description: Samples per second, the output sample rate.

parameters.name: Swap Output
parameters.label: Swap Output
parameters.description: Reverse the X and Y channel outputs.

parameters.name: X Scale
parameters.label: X Scale
parameters.description: Scale the x amplitude.

parameters.name: Y Scale
parameters.label: Y Scale
parameters.description: Scale the y amplitude.

parameters.name: Rotate
parameters.label: Rotate
parameters.description: Specified in degrees, rotates the output x,y values.

parameters.name: Randomize Samples
parameters.label: Randomize Samples
parameters.description: Output all samples in a random order. Creates a fuzzy chaotic image on an oscilloscope.

parameters.name: Output Color
parameters.label: Output Color
parameters.description: If on, r,g,b channels are created.If on, r,g,b channels are created.

parameters.name: Red Scale
parameters.label: Red Scale
parameters.description: Scale the output r channel.

parameters.name: Green Scale
parameters.label: Green Scale
parameters.description: Scale the output g channel.

parameters.name: Blue Scale
parameters.label: Blue Scale
parameters.description: Scale the output b channel.

parameters.name: Blanking Count
parameters.label: Blanking Count
parameters.description: In the case of SOP input, the number of black/off positions to insert between geometry primitives. In the case of TOP input, the number of black/off positions to insert between full raster scans. Color output must be enabled.In the case of SOP input, the number of black/off positions to insert between geometry primitives. In the case of TOP input, the number of black/off positions to insert between full raster scans. Color output must be enabled.

parameters.name: TOP
parameters.label: TOP
parameters.description: Path to the TOP node.

parameters.name: Width
parameters.label: Width
parameters.description: The number of columns to resample the image at.

parameters.name: Height
parameters.label: Height
parameters.description: The number of rows to resample the image at.

parameters.name: Level
parameters.label: Level
parameters.description: The number of brightness levels each pixel can have.

parameters.name: Auto Reduce
parameters.label: Auto Reduce
parameters.description: Automatically reduce the number of rows and columns dynamically to keep the output frame rate at a constant level.

parameters.name: Layered
parameters.label: Layered
parameters.description: Output the pixels in order of brightness, else they are output left to right for each row.

parameters.name: Interleave
parameters.label: Interleave
parameters.description: Controls the order in which rows are output to minimize flicker.

parameters.name: SOP
parameters.label: SOP
parameters.description: Path to the SOP node.

parameters.name: Vertex Order
parameters.label: Vertex Order
parameters.description: Output the points in the same order as the vertices of each polygon, instead of the order in which the points are defined in the geometry.

parameters.name: Limit Step Size
parameters.label: Limit Step Size
parameters.description: Breakup long x,y jumps into several smaller incremental jumps.

parameters.name: Step Size
parameters.label: Step Size
parameters.description: The distance each x,y can change when above option enabled.

parameters.name: Vertex Repeat
parameters.label: Vertex Repeat
parameters.description: Repeat each vertex of the each primitive multiple times.

parameters.name: Camera
parameters.label: Camera
parameters.description: Project the geometry onto a 2D plane from this camera, otherwise, only the original x,y components of the geometry are used.

parameters.name: CHOP
parameters.label: CHOP
parameters.description: Path to the CHOP node.

parameters.name: Trigger
parameters.label: Trigger
parameters.description: The output graph will begin where its value exceeds this value. This allows for steady 'frozen' waveforms, analagous to an oscilloscope triggered sweep.

parameters.name: Trigger Value
parameters.label: Trigger Value
parameters.description: The value to begin the trigger.

parameters.name: Trim
parameters.label: Trim
parameters.description: Limit the length of the CHOP to be scanned.

parameters.name: Trim Value
parameters.label: Trim Value
parameters.description: The length of the CHOP to be scanned.

parameters.name: Trim Units
parameters.label: Trim Units
parameters.description: Select the units to use for this parameter, Samples, Frames, or Seconds.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the live Scan_CHOP wiki page
